recipe.title: Jacket potato
recipe.description: Nothing quite hits the spot like a good jacket potato. Learn the best way to cook the perfect crispy-skinned potato, with fabulous filling ideas.

steps.descr: Wash and scrub the potatoes and dry with a clean tea...
steps.instructions: Wash and scrub the potatoes and dry with a clean tea towel – dry skin will ensure it’ll be crispy once baked.

on_enter.say: Wash and scrub the potatoes and dry with a clean tea towel – dry skin will ensure it’ll be crispy once baked.

steps.descr: Rub each potato with 1 teaspoon of olive oil (oil also...
steps.instructions: Rub each potato with 1 teaspoon of olive oil (oil also helps the skin go golden) and season with a small pinch of sea salt, then use a fork to pierce it six times, all around the potato.

on_enter.say: Rub each potato with 1 teaspoon of olive oil (oil also helps the skin go golden) and season with a small pinch of sea salt, then use a fork to pierce it six times, all around the potato.

steps.descr: Place on a baking tray and bake for 1 hour to 1¼ hours,...
steps.instructions: Place on a baking tray and bake for 1 hour to 1¼ hours, until the potatoes are crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.

on_enter.say: Place on a baking tray and bake for 1 hour to 1¼ hours, until the potatoes are crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.

steps.descr: Transfer to a board and cut open straight away – if you...
steps.instructions: Transfer to a board and cut open straight away – if you let the potato sit after baking, the interior will steam and the potato can become soggy and heavy.

on_enter.say: Transfer to a board and cut open straight away – if you let the potato sit after baking, the interior will steam and the potato can become soggy and heavy.

steps.descr: Top with your favourite filling, or check out our ideas...
steps.instructions: Top with your favourite filling, or check out our ideas below for some inspo!

on_enter.say: Top with your favourite filling, or check out our ideas below for some inspo!
